title: Problem List
description: The IPS problem section lists and describes clinical problems or conditions currently being monitored for the patient.

bindings.title: Problem List Finding/Situation/Event (all SNOMED CT)
bindings.ecl: < 404684003 |Clinical finding (finding)| OR < 272379006 |Event (event)| OR < 243796009 |Situation with explicit context|
bindings.note: Searching problem list codes using a complete edition of SNOMED CT.

bindings.title: Problem List Finding/Situation/Event (IPS Refset)
bindings.ecl: (< 404684003 |Clinical finding (finding)| OR < 272379006 |Event (event)| OR < 243796009 |Situation with explicit context|) AND (^816080008 |International Patient Summary|)
bindings.note: Searching problem list codes using members of the IPS Refset only.
